extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO attacked inside 2km on the final climb after his team neutralized crosswind splits, taking stage and jersey from KRISTOFF
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO used aggressive riding in crosswinds to defend position before winning, attack as best form of defense confirmed.
VAN HECKE Preben collected intermediate points from breakaway while teammate worked for him, Lotto doubling classification targets.
Right-hand crosswinds created echelons that eliminated GC threats before final climb, positioning crucial before 15km mark.
KRISTOFF cracked at 2km despite holding position until final climb, red jersey defense failed when gradient hit.

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: won stage after initiating crosswind splits earlier, showed rare combination of classics positioning and climbing punch
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: lost jersey at 2km after defending well, lacks climbing capacity to hold gains on uphill finishes
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: neutral: dropped by LUTSENKO inside 2km on climb, lost 1 second but survived crosswinds
rider_signals.VAN HECKE Preben: positive: targeted points classification from breakaway while team supported him, strategic KOM hunting confirmed
